title: Pumpkin Pie No. 1
ingredients_original: milk; boiled strained pumpkin; sugar; molasses; eggs; salt; ginger; cinnamon
directions_original: Beat ingredients together and bake with an under crust.

title: Sweet Potato Pie
ingredients_original: sweet potatoes; sugar; cream; butter; eggs; lemon or nutmeg; pastry shell
directions_original: Steam and mash sweet potatoes; combine with sugar, cream, butter, eggs, flavoring, and bake in pastry shell.

title: Lemon Pie II
ingredients_original: sugar; boiling water; corn-starch; flour; egg yolks; lemon juice; lemon rind; butter; meringue
directions_original: Cook starch mixture, add butter, egg yolks and lemon; cool, bake in crust, top with meringue, and brown.
